name: Sundance Strategies, Inc.
summary: Sundance Strategies, Inc. is a Nevada corporation that historically purchased life insurance policies and residual interests (Net Insurance Benefits, or NIBs) in portfolios of life settlement policies. More recently, the company shifted to providing professional advisory and structuring services to specialty structured finance groups, bond issuers, and life settlement aggregators, including advising on investment-grade bond offerings backed by life insurance policy portfolios and managed cash.

products.name: Net Insurance Benefits (NIBs)
products.description: Contractual rights to receive net insurance proceeds from portfolios of life insurance policies held by third-party Holders, after expenses are paid.

products.name: Professional Advisory Services
products.description: Advisory and structuring services for bond issuers, bond investors, and life settlement aggregators, including proprietary analytics for investment-grade bond offerings.

products.name: Proprietary Investment-Grade Bond Structuring
products.description: Origination and structuring of proprietary bond instruments backed by life settlement assets and managed cash, including ratings advisement.
